payload.claim_text: MTA operates a Fuel Hedge Program to manage fuel price risk for Ultra Low Sulfur Diesel and Compressed Natural Gas

The annual impact assessment as of August 30, 2022 shows net unfavorable impacts from current fuel prices vs. the 2022 Adopted Budget for both Ultra Low Sulfur Diesel and Compressed Natural Gas, partially offset by hedge impacts

tool_args.label: MTA published Fuel Hedge Program document

payload.description: MTA published the Fuel Hedge Program document
